name: Vikram Sharma
title: ML Engineer & Data Scientist
summary: Data scientist and ML engineer with 4+ years building production-grade AI/ML systems. Expert in NLP, computer vision, and time-series forecasting. Published researcher with 2+ papers. Experienced deploying models at scale serving millions of users.

experience.description: Building NLP and AI services for Azure Cognitive Services platform.
achievements: Built NLP pipelines for Azure Cognitive Services processing 1M+ daily requests
Deployed multilingual sentiment analysis model achieving 95.2% accuracy across 12 languages
Optimized model inference latency from 500ms to 50ms using quantization
Led team of 3 engineers on document classification project generating $500K+ ARR
Mentored 2 junior ML engineers on production ML best practices

experience.description: Built end-to-end machine learning systems for customer analytics.
achievements: Built customer churn prediction model (XGBoost) achieving 89% AUC
Created end-to-end ML pipeline with automatic feature engineering and deployment
Built Streamlit dashboard with SHAP explanations for business stakeholders
Increased model accuracy by 12% through advanced feature engineering
Deployed models to production serving 50K+ predictions monthly

experience.description: Conducted research on efficient NLP and transformer optimization.
achievements: Implemented BERT-based text classification achieving state-of-the-art results
Published 2 research papers on NLP optimization techniques
Contributed to open-source transformer library with 2K+ GitHub stars
Presented findings at AI research conferences

projects.title: SentimentAPI
projects.description: Production-ready sentiment analysis API supporting 12 languages. Fine-tuned mBERT on 500K+ manual annotations achieving 95.2% accuracy. Serves 100K+ requests daily with <200ms p99 latency.

projects.title: ChurnPredict
projects.description: End-to-end ML pipeline for customer churn prediction with feature engineering, XGBoost model, SHAP explanations, and interactive Streamlit dashboard for business insights.

projects.title: ImageClassifier
projects.tagline: Custom vision model library with transfer learning
projects.description: PyTorch library for building and deploying custom computer vision models. Includes pre-trained weights, data augmentation pipeline, ONNX export, and quantization support.

projects.title: TimeSeriesForecasting
projects.description: Production-grade LSTM framework for time-series forecasting with multivariate support, attention mechanism, and uncertainty quantification.
